overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in historical attire walking through Mediterranean-style salt evaporation ponds with distinctive pink water and white salt mounds. The character explores the area, passing workers and approaching a traditional windmill against a backdrop of coastal mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt evaporation ponds with harvesting mounds

events.description: traditional windmill becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along stone pathways between pink salt evaporation ponds, passing workers harvesting salt

notable_agents.action: worker raking or gathering salt in the evaporation pond

entered.detail: large white piles of harvested salt stacked between the evaporation ponds
shallow pools of pinkish water used for salt extraction
narrow paved paths separating the salt ponds
wooden windmill with canvas sails visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through expansive salt flats, with white salt mounds lining the left side and pink evaporation ponds on the right. A few workers are visible in the distance tending to the salt harvest. Around the 12-second mark, a traditional windmill appears on the right horizon as the character continues along the stone pathways.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal salt flats with windmill and mountain vista

events.description: character begins turning right toward the windmill and mountains
character raises right arm in a gesturing motion while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the windmill, gesturing with one hand while observing the coastal scenery

notable_agents.action: worker continuing to rake salt in the pond as the character passes by

entered.detail: large rocky mountain range rising behind the windmill along the coastline
green leafy trees and bushes lining the right side of the path
raised stone wall separating the walkway from the lower salt ponds

segments.scene_description: The character turns right toward the windmill, revealing a stunning backdrop of rocky coastal mountains. The salt mounds fall behind as the path curves along the pink water's edge, passing scattered trees and a stone embankment. The windmill grows larger in the frame as the character gestures and continues exploring the scenic salt flats.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through expansive salt flats that gradually shifts focus toward a traditional windmill set against a mountain backdrop. It begins with the character walking along stone pathways, flanked by white salt mounds on the left and vibrant pink evaporation ponds on the right while distant workers tend to the harvest. As the character continues forward, a traditional windmill emerges on the right horizon, drawing the camera's attention. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, leaving the salt mounds behind to follow the curve of the pink water's edge past scattered trees and a stone embankment. Finally, the view expands to reveal stunning rocky coastal mountains in the distance as the windmill grows larger in the frame.
